text: I think that there is going to be a time in the next 20 years where it will make complete sense to everybody on the planet, the Chinese included and every other significant power to cooperate on safety on safety and containment and alignment. It is completely rational for self-preservation. You know, these are very powerful systems that present as much of a threat to the person, the bad actor that is using the model as it does to the, you know, the the the the victim. That will that will create, you know, a an an interest in in cooperation, which, you know, is kind of hard to empathize with at this stage given how polarized the world is. But I do think it's coming.

title: Microsoft AI's CEO Predicts Universal AI Safety Treaty With China Within 20 Years | MOONSHOTS
